name: Tanvex BioPharma, Inc.
summary: Tanvex BioPharma, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of biosimilar and biologic products and drugs in Taiwan and the United States. Its products pipeline include TX01, which has completed phase III clinical trials; TX05, which is in phase III clinical trials for the treatment of cancer; TX16 which is in phase I; and other products. The company was formerly known as Ruenvex Biotech, Inc. Tanvex BioPharma, Inc. was incorporated in 2013 and is based in George Town, the Cayman Islands.
